deltas.current_value: Provides a governance framework for Copilot Tuning lifecycle in 5,000+ license organizations — data selection, access controls, output supervision, audit trails, and model risk alignment.
deltas.proposed_value: Provides a governance framework for Microsoft 365 Copilot Tuning (early access preview) lifecycle in eligible tenants with at least 5,000 Microsoft 365 Copilot licenses — data selection, access controls, output supervision, audit trails, and model risk alignment.
deltas.rationale: Microsoft Learn identifies Microsoft 365 Copilot Tuning as early access preview and limits public preview eligibility to tenants with at least 5,000 Microsoft 365 Copilot licenses.

deltas.current_value: Copilot Tuning governance assessment and lifecycle management is a native output of solution 19.
deltas.proposed_value: Copilot Tuning governance assessment and lifecycle management is a native output of solution 19; live Microsoft 365 Copilot Tuning governance requires tenant binding in eligible early access preview tenants with at least 5,000 Microsoft 365 Copilot licenses.
deltas.rationale: Microsoft Learn identifies Microsoft 365 Copilot Tuning as early access preview and limits public preview eligibility to tenants with at least 5,000 Microsoft 365 Copilot licenses.
